events.title: Old Town Artisan Market
events.description: Local craftspeople sell ceramics, jewellery, olive-wood products and art along the Old Town walls. Every Saturday morning through summer.

events.title: Boka Through the Lens — Photo Exhibition
events.description: Exhibition of contemporary Montenegrin photography exploring life along the Boka bay, hosted in the Modern Gallery. Open daily except Mondays.

events.title: Jazz on the Square
events.description: Free open-air jazz evening on the Old Town's main square with a quartet playing standards and Balkan-influenced originals.

events.title: Family Aqua Day at Slovenska Beach
events.description: Inflatable water park, beach games and swimming lessons for kids, with lifeguards and instructors on site all day.

events.title: Grad Teatar — Theatre City Festival Opening
events.description: Budva's flagship summer festival transforms the Old Town into an open-air stage. The opening night features a major regional theatre production on the Citadela stage, followed by weeks of drama, music and poetry.

events.title: Budva Night Run 5K/10K
events.description: Evening road race along the riviera promenade from Slovenska beach to Bečići and back. Start packs include a chip, t-shirt and post-race refreshments.

events.title: Riviera Street Food Festival
events.description: Three days of street food trucks, local specialties and craft beer on the promenade, with cooking demos by coastal chefs each evening.

events.title: Sea Dance Warm-Up Party
events.description: Beach warm-up party ahead of the Sea Dance Festival with regional electronic acts on Jaz beach. Camping area opens at noon.
